creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #7)

It's very strange.  For some reason libserf-1.so is explicitly getting linked directly to those libraries even though they are indirect dependencies via libapr-1.  I haven't figured out why scons has decided to do that.  Those libraries are not listed in the apr-1.pc and apr-util-1.pc files.
